release_notes:
🚀 New Update (1.2.5)

- 🕌 Live prayer countdown timer with next-prayer highlight
- 🔔 Notifications now appear on the lock screen
- 🔔 Adhan alerts now wake your screen
- 🔁 Notifications now recur daily automatically
- ⚡ Faster app startup & smoother scrolling
- 🐛 Multiple bug fixes and stability improvements
